articles.title: 18-year-old allegedly brandishes gun during argument outside Mass. high school prom
articles.description:
The teen, who was not a student at the school, also threatened to run over a student, police say.

The post 18-year-old allegedly brandishes gun during argument outside Mass. high school prom appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: 18-year-old brandished a gun during an argument outside a Massachusetts high school prom.
The suspect threatened to run over a student; he was not a school attendee.
Incident raises safety concerns for Boston high school events and student gatherings.
